name: Old- Time Beef Stew
recipeIngredient: 6 medium white potatoes, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, paprika, and garlic powder in a plastic bag.
2. Coat the stew beef with the flour mixture and brown it in hot oil in a large Dutch oven.
3. Once all the meat is browned, add the remaining ingredients (except for 1/2 cup cold water and 1/4 cup flour) to the pot.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, cover, and simmer for 2-3 hours.
5. When the vegetables are cooked, thicken the stew by stirring together 1/2 cup cold water and 1/4 cup flour.
To cook in a crockpot:
1. Brown the flour-coated meat as directed above.
2. Place the browned meat and remaining ingredients (except for thickening ingredients) into the crockpot.
3. Cook on low for 10-12 hours or on high for 5-6 hours.
